reviews.comment:
Tarda una eternidad el playero. carga de a uno cuando Los surtidores tienen traba y cortan solos en todo el mundo, menos acá aparentemente.
O al menos parece que no se enteró el muchacho. 30 o 40 minutos haciendo colas en el sol, solo para cargar NAFTA. Increíble el desgano del playero.

(Translated by Google)
The gas station attendant takes forever. He fills up one at a time, even though the pumps everywhere else in the world have automatic shut-off valves, except here apparently.

Or at least it seems the guy didn't get the memo. Thirty or forty minutes waiting in line in the sun, just to fill up with gas. The attendant's apathy is unbelievable.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/16014244491390867425/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURENlB5NHV3RRAB

reviews.comment:
Única estación de servicio de bandera entre Tinogasta y Fiambala.
Todos los surtidores habilitados y con 2 empleados por isla, todos atienden bien, en mi experiencia así lo fue.
La demanda y las colas de vehículos es lógica.
El combustible a comparación de otras estaciones (sin bandera) de la zona, es a buen precio.
Vi servicio de agua caliente 24 hs. Venta de hielo también.
Ofrecen todos los medios de pago y descuentos.
La atención en el servicompras también muy buena y rápida en la medida que la demanda lo permite y sino, se espera poco tiempo.

(Translated by Google)
The only branded gas station between Tinogasta and Fiambalá.
All pumps are working, with two employees per island, and they all provide good service; in my experience, that was the case.
The demand and lines of vehicles are understandable.
The fuel is reasonably priced compared to other (non-branded) stations in the area. I saw they have 24-hour hot water service. They also sell ice.
They accept all forms of payment and offer discounts. The service at the convenience store is also very good and fast, as long as demand allows; otherwise, the wait is short.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/16014244491390867425/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNKcXNUTGR3EAE
